title: Treebo Hotels Global Group is Hiring: E-commerce Executive (Lead)

jsonLd.title: Treebo Hotels Global Group is Hiring: E-commerce Executive (Lead)
jsonLd.description:
Join the Treebo Hotels Global Group family as a E-commerce Executive in Patna. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Treebo Hotels Global Group:
Treebo Hotels Global Group is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in Email Marketing
• Proficiency in Magento
• Proficiency in Content Writing
• Proficiency in Influencer Marketing
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Digital Marketing
• Proficiency in WooCommerce

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Learning & development budget
• Annual performance appraisal
• Flexible working hours
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Patna, Bihar, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Treebo Hotels Global Group!
